headline: AeroVironment (AVAV) Moves 18.3% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: AeroVironment (AVAV) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Question
summary: Mid-cap stocks often strike the right balance between having proven business models and market opportunities that can support $100 billion corporations. However, they face intense competition from scaled industry giants and can be disrupted by new innovative players vying for a slice of the pie.
